sent_simp: 你在家里排行老几？
sent_trad: 你在家裡排行老幾？
pinyin: Nǐ zài jiā lǐ páiháng lǎo jǐ?
english: Where do you rank among your siblings?

sent_simp: 大会报告员宣布了最终结果。
sent_trad: 大會報告員宣布了最終結果。
pinyin: Dàhuì bàogàoyuán xuānbùle zuìzhōng jiéguǒ.
english: The conference announcer declared the final results.

sent_simp: 苏轼是宋代著名的词人。
sent_trad: 蘇軾是宋代著名的詞人。
pinyin: Sū Shì shì Sòngdài zhùmíng de círén.
english: Su Shi was a famous ci poet of the Song dynasty.

sent_simp: 他离开本乡二十年了。
sent_trad: 他離開本鄉二十年了。
pinyin: Tā líkāi běn xiāng èrshí nián le.
english: He has been away from his home village for twenty years.

sent_simp: 造假的商家必须依法法办。
sent_trad: 造假的商家必須依法法辦。
pinyin: Zào jiǎ de shāngjiā bìxū yīfǎ fǎbàn.
english: Merchants who sell counterfeit goods must be brought to justice.

sent_simp: 他刚说不会输，结果第一局就输了，真打脸。
sent_trad: 他剛說不會輸，結果第一局就輸了，真打臉。
pinyin: Tā gāng shuō bù huì shū, jiéguǒ dì yī jú jiù shū le, zhēn dǎliǎn.
english: He just said he wouldn't lose, then lost the very first round — talk about putting egg on his face.

sent_simp: 洪灾期间军民团结一致抗洪。
sent_trad: 洪災期間軍民團結一致抗洪。
pinyin: Hóng zāi qījiān jūn mín tuánjié yīzhì kàng hóng.
english: During the flood, soldiers and civilians united to fight the disaster.

sent_simp: 东正教在俄罗斯有很大影响力。
sent_trad: 東正教在俄羅斯有很大影響力。
pinyin: Dōngzhèngjiào zài Éluósī yǒu hěn dà yǐngxiǎnglì.
english: Orthodox Christianity has great influence in Russia.

sent_simp: 他名头很大，但实力一般。
sent_trad: 他名頭很大，但實力一般。
pinyin: Tā míng tóu hěn dà, dàn shílì yībān.
english: He has a big reputation, but his actual ability is just average.

sent_simp: 祠堂里供着祖先的神位。
sent_trad: 祠堂裡供著祖先的神位。
pinyin: Cítáng lǐ gòng zhe zǔxiān de shénwèi.
english: The ancestral tablets are enshrined in the family hall.

sent_simp: 这个板块的版主管理得很认真。
sent_trad: 這個板塊的版主管理得很認真。
pinyin: Zhège bǎnkuài de bǎnzhǔ guǎnlǐ de hěn rènzhēn.
english: The moderator of this forum section does a very conscientious job.

sent_simp: 寺庙里有一尊巨大的佛陀坐像。
sent_trad: 寺廟裡有一尊巨大的佛陀坐像。
pinyin: Sìmiào lǐ yǒu yī zūn jùdà de Fótuó zuòxiàng.
english: There is a huge seated Buddha statue in the temple.

sent_simp: 极端国家主义往往会引发冲突。
sent_trad: 極端國家主義往往會引發衝突。
pinyin: Jíduān guójiā zhǔyì wǎngwǎng huì yǐnfā chōngtū.
english: Extreme nationalism often leads to conflict.

sent_simp: 他被判处三年有期徒刑。
sent_trad: 他被判處三年有期徒刑。
pinyin: Tā bèi pànchǔ sān nián yǒuqī túxíng.
english: He was sentenced to three years in prison.

sent_simp: 新皇帝登基后宣布改元。
sent_trad: 新皇帝登基後宣布改元。
pinyin: Xīn huángdì dēngjī hòu xuānbù gǎi yuán.
english: After ascending the throne, the new emperor declared a change of reign title.

sent_simp: 他在一家上市公司担任财务总监。
sent_trad: 他在一家上市公司擔任財務總監。
pinyin: Tā zài yī jiā shàngshì gōngsī dānrèn cáiwù zǒngjiān.
english: He serves as CFO at a listed company.

sent_simp: 这家银行的风险管理做得很到位。
sent_trad: 這家銀行的風險管理做得很到位。
pinyin: Zhè jiā yínháng de fēngxiǎn guǎnlǐ zuò de hěn dàowèi.
english: This bank's risk management is very well executed.

sent_simp: 樱花的花期只有一两周。
sent_trad: 櫻花的花期只有一兩週。
pinyin: Yīnghuā de huāqī zhǐyǒu yī liǎng zhōu.
english: Cherry blossoms are only in bloom for a week or two.

sent_simp: 这条消息由一家国际通讯社发布。
sent_trad: 這條消息由一家國際通訊社發布。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo xiāoxi yóu yī jiā guójì tōngxùnshè fābù.
english: This news was released by an international news agency.

sent_simp: 古代有钱人常娶小老婆。
sent_trad: 古代有錢人常娶小老婆。
pinyin: Gǔdài yǒuqián rén cháng qǔ xiǎo lǎo pó.
english: In ancient times, wealthy men often took concubines.

sent_simp: 村里的员外把土地租给了农民。
sent_trad: 村裡的員外把土地租給了農民。
pinyin: Cūn lǐ de yuánwài bǎ tǔdì zū gěi le nóngmín.
english: The village landlord rented the land out to the farmers.

sent_simp: 用骚货这种词骂人是很不尊重的。
sent_trad: 用騷貨這種詞罵人是很不尊重的。
pinyin: Yòng sāo huò zhè zhǒng cí mà rén shì hěn bù zūnzhòng de.
english: Using words like "slut" to insult someone is very disrespectful.

sent_simp: 农业是国民经济的基础。
sent_trad: 農業是國民經濟的基礎。
pinyin: Nóngyè shì guómín jīngjì de jīchǔ.
english: Agriculture is the foundation of the national economy.

sent_simp: 我们学校来了一位英国外教。
sent_trad: 我們學校來了一位英國外教。
pinyin: Wǒmen xuéxiào lái le yī wèi Yīngguó wàijiào.
english: A foreign teacher from the UK has come to our school.

sent_simp: 他因违纪被取消了比赛资格。
sent_trad: 他因違紀被取消了比賽資格。
pinyin: Tā yīn wéi jì bèi qǔxiāo le bǐsài zīgé.
english: He was disqualified from the competition for violating the rules.

sent_simp: 请按分项填写表格中的各项内容。
sent_trad: 請按分項填寫表格中的各項內容。
pinyin: Qǐng àn fēnxiàng tiánxiě biǎogé zhōng de gè xiàng nèiróng.
english: Please fill in each sub-item of the form accordingly.

sent_simp: 这项提案将通过公投来决定。
sent_trad: 這項提案將通過公投來決定。
pinyin: Zhè xiàng tí'àn jiāng tōngguò gōngtóu lái juédìng.
english: This proposal will be decided by referendum.

sent_simp: 她的五指修长，很适合弹钢琴。
sent_trad: 她的五指修長，很適合彈鋼琴。
pinyin: Tā de wǔ zhǐ xiūcháng, hěn shìhé tán gāngqín.
english: Her five fingers are slender, perfect for playing the piano.

sent_simp: 货物从这个口岸进出口。
sent_trad: 貨物從這個口岸進出口。
pinyin: Huòwù cóng zhège kǒu'àn jìnchūkǒu.
english: Goods are imported and exported through this port.

sent_simp: 计划生育政策在中国实行了几十年。
sent_trad: 計劃生育政策在中國實行了幾十年。
pinyin: Jìhuà shēngyù zhèngcè zài Zhōngguó shíxíng le jǐ shí nián.
english: The family planning policy was implemented in China for several decades.

sent_simp: 这份工作是他努力得来的。
sent_trad: 這份工作是他努力得來的。
pinyin: Zhè fèn gōngzuò shì tā nǔlì délái de.
english: He earned this job through his own hard work.

sent_simp: 记者拒绝透露消息来源。
sent_trad: 記者拒絕透露消息來源。
pinyin: Jìzhě jùjué tòulù xiāoxi láiyuán.
english: The journalist refused to reveal the source of the information.

sent_simp: 这位老师做事很有原则性，从不徇私。
sent_trad: 這位老師做事很有原則性，從不徇私。
pinyin: Zhè wèi lǎoshī zuòshì hěn yǒu yuánzé xìng, cóng bù xùnsī.
english: This teacher is very principled and never shows favoritism.

sent_simp: 这条街是全市的商贸中心。
sent_trad: 這條街是全市的商貿中心。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo jiē shì quán shì de shāngmào zhōngxīn.
english: This street is the trade and commerce hub of the entire city.

sent_simp: 分析师认为这支股票的基本面不错。
sent_trad: 分析師認為這支股票的基本面不錯。
pinyin: Fēnxī shī rènwéi zhè zhī gǔpiào de jīběnmiàn bùcuò.
english: Analysts believe the fundamentals of this stock are solid.

sent_simp: 闲话少说，言归正传。
sent_trad: 閒話少說，言歸正傳。
pinyin: Xiánhuà shǎo shuō, yán guī zhèngzhuàn.
english: Enough chit-chat — let's get back to the main topic.

sent_simp: 外电报道称双方已达成协议。
sent_trad: 外電報道稱雙方已達成協議。
pinyin: Wàidiàn bàodào chēng shuāngfāng yǐ dáchéng xiéyì.
english: Reports from foreign news agencies say the two sides have reached an agreement.

sent_simp: 她在颧骨上打了一点高光，气色好多了。
sent_trad: 她在顴骨上打了一點高光，氣色好多了。
pinyin: Tā zài quángǔ shàng dǎ le yīdiǎn gāoguāng, qìsè hǎo duō le.
english: She applied a little highlighter on her cheekbones and looked much more radiant.

sent_simp: 他从小就认了邻居阿姨当干妈。
sent_trad: 他從小就認了鄰居阿姨當乾媽。
pinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo jiù rèn le línjū āyí dāng gànmā.
english: He has called the neighbor auntie his adoptive mother since he was little.

sent_simp: 公司的固定资产包括厂房和设备。
sent_trad: 公司的固定資產包括廠房和設備。
pinyin: Gōngsī de gùdìng zīchǎn bāokuò chǎngfáng hé shèbèi.
english: The company's fixed assets include the factory building and equipment.
